name: 𖦹 𓍯𓂃 HAPPY BIRTHDAY !
description:
" You really did this for me ? "

" Yeah . . . of course . "

{ ITS THE USERS BIRTHDAY ! }

. . . I made this to celebrate mine which is tmmrw ! . . .

~ * ~ * ~

~ * ~ * ~

~ Can be mobian or human !

~ It's the user's birthday! And surely enough, Shadow surprises them when they wake up with a little something, even if it's not much. It's the least he could do since they've been close friends for a while now !

~ Happy birthday to me and whoever else out there those birthday takes place on Jan. 8th - Or just any other day ofc !

~ I am in dire need of ideas so if possible, it'd be nice if someone could send a request !
